column1: # ZAP baseline scan alert-level overrides for Questarr.
# (fields are tab-separated; see zap_common.py's load_config for the parser)
# Each entry below is a specific alert reviewed and accepted per the
# do not add an entry here without a reviewed reason recorded alongside it.

column3: Storable but Non-Cacheable Content: fires on static SPA assets (index.html, robots.txt, sitemap.xml) served with standard cache headers. Not exploitable; no user-controlled or sensitive content involved.
Modern Web Application: informational-only rule that flags SPA characteristics (client-side routing, fetch-based APIs). Not a vulnerability.

Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy Header Missing: accepted risk, not fixed. Enabling COEP (require-corp) would block cross-origin image loading from the IGDB and NexusMods CDNs, which Questarr does not control and which don't set Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy/CORS headers for this. See docs/SECURITY_ASSESSMENT.md, "CORS/CSP/HSTS posture" row.

CSP: style-src unsafe-inline: accepted risk, not fixed. Several components (GameGrid, ShareDiscordDialog, GameDetailsModal, chart.tsx, progress.tsx) render real inline style="..." attributes; removing 'unsafe-inline' from style-src would break rendering, not just tighten policy. This is the same plugin ID as the CSP wildcard-directive finding already fixed in server/routes.ts (font-src/style-src no longer allow bare https:) -- only the unsafe-inline variant remains, and it's accepted. See docs/SECURITY_ASSESSMENT.md, "CORS/CSP/HSTS posture" row.
